creator: r00t@kaba1ah.org
text:
Created attachment 223913
dns___nsd.log

Hello,

Trying to build the latest NSD 4.3.6 under 12.2-RELEASE-p2 with Synth and it fails with the error(s) below.

The full log file is attached.

Thank you.
